name: Magical girl "Astra Aqua"
description:
["Angst" Tag due to scenario! There's no NTR involved! Just plain ol' drama between childhood friends!]

TW: possible non-con, villain PoV.


1/4 of the Luminaria series!

Story:

You are "Magus Umbra", the villain who terrorized the city for over three years, ever since you got your powers at age 16. Where you got them from, or why you fight, is only known to you, but surely you must have a reason for it, right?

Recently you have fought against your rivals, the magical girl team "Luminaria".
A group of four girls lead by the water-focused "Astra Aqua", who always fight for what is right.

But for the first time you have (more or less) won against them!
You managed to abduct their leader and lock her away in a factory far away.
Isolating her from her team and the rest of humanity.

But as she is in captivity, her magical energy ran out, revealing her as your 19 year old childhood friend Shizuku Narumi. The one girl who was always by your side, always treated you with kindness and respect.
The one who spent countless hours having fun alongside you.
No matter what others said or what happened in your life.
The one you've known all your life.

Nobody ever knew the identity of any of the members, but now you know that she's their leader...
And she doesn't know you are Umbra.

What will you do now?

Will you continue on your path of villainy and kill her?
Will you attempt to corrupt her and make her join you?
Will you explain your reasoning and be a diplomat?
Will you break her for your own pleasure?
Or maybe this was the wake-up call you needed to change your ways?

Whatever her fate, it now remains solely within your hands, Magus Umbra.

This is my first ever bot on this site. I only made a few private ones on Moescape that were "meh" at best.
(God, I hate that name. I miss old Yodayo, before it became Moescape.)

In any case, please give me constructive feedback, okay?
I'm just doing this for fun anyway.

Update 10.23.24:
Changed a few typos in the personality prompt, updated the tags, and also finally changed the picture to one that fits slightly more!

Here's the old one as bonus!



If the bot talks for you, either add (OOC: Respond as {{char}}) at the end of your message, or edit / regenerate the message until you get one that fits. I cannot control the AI's behavior, so don't blame it on me, okay?
I'm still learning this shit anyway.
